g.text: to detect cross device or same device
html page with QRCode or href containing the url
Show the QRCode page or click the href button
Provide Wallet metadata to the request_uri endpoint
[if request_uri_method is set with GET or not present]
Request the signed request object from the request_uri endpoint
Evaluate Relying Party Metadata and policies
Verify signature of the signed Request Object
and the Wallet Instance is not revoked.
- Check Holder Key Binding and Proof of Possession using
the public key bound in the Credential to verify the VP token.
- Extract the disclosed attributes and check if all the required data are available.
Cross Device or Same Device without redirect_uri
